front: What is the steady-state response to x(t)=C cos(omega0 t) for a stable LTI system?
back: y_ss(t)=C|H(j omega0)| cos(omega0 t + angle H(j omega0)).

front: Which part of the total response disappears for a stable system?
back: The transient response y_t(t) decays to zero.

front: How is the frequency response related to the transfer function?
